pattern: Sliding window with a frequency map caps the window to at most two distinct values, expanding right and shrinking left as needed.
hints: The constraint of two basket types means the window can hold at most two distinct fruit types.
Expand the window right freely; when a third type enters, shrink from the left until only two remain.
Track counts in a hash map; remove a type when its count drops to zero.

edge_inputs.description: optimal window does not start at index 0
long run of one type after switch

stress.description: random array with fruit types up to n/3 to force many basket switches
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = min(100000, max(1, size))
    k = max(3, n // 3)
    fruits = [rng.randint(0, k - 1) for _ in range(n)]
    return [fruits]
